## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SentinelOne and growthx.ai to discuss content strategy, AI positioning, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is developing an AI-focused content strategy for SentinelOne, targeting both top and middle-of-funnel keywords](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [A CVE database template was proposed, pending review and approval from SentinelOne's security team](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Product deep dive with Tim scheduled for Thursday to gather in-depth AI capabilities information](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Scrunch AI dashboard to be set up for tracking SentinelOne's visibility in LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)

## Topics

### AI Content Strategy

  - [SentinelOne has minimal existing content on AI and cybersecurity](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [GrowthX proposed a content approach mixing top and middle-of-funnel topics](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Content to be published in the "Data and AI" section of Cybersecurity 101](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [Plan to develop 40-50 blog topic ideas](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Focus on avoiding vague product claims, emphasizing specific AI capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)

### CVE Database Project

  - [GrowthX delivered a CVE template and page proposal](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Template uses public APIs as data sources](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Ankit to review and involve security team for template approval](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Once approved, GrowthX's dev team will build and integrate pages](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Security team to help prioritize CVE list based on products and technologies](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)

### Product Deep Dive

  - [Meeting scheduled with Tim (PMM) on Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Mahati advised to use the full hour and gather all necessary information](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Focus on AI capabilities to support content generation](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [GrowthX to update artifacts post-meeting with new insights](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)

### LLM Visibility Tracking

  - [GrowthX to set up Scrunch AI dashboard for SentinelOne](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [Tracks visibility in LLMs like ChatGPT and Perplexity](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [Provides data on mention frequency, competitor comparisons, and sentiment](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [Weekly data sharing, with plans to integrate into Looker dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)

### Team Coordination

  - [Drew (PST-based) unable to attend due to time zone differences](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Mahati experiencing high workload, requesting guidance on next steps](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Ali Kramer (integrated marketing) hasn't responded to meeting request](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to begin AI content research and topic ideation](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
  - [Ankit to review CVE page template and involve internal stakeholders](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Prepare thoroughly for Thursday's product deep dive with Tim](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Set up Scrunch AI dashboard and begin tracking LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [Follow up with Ali Kramer for potential meeting on integrated marketing](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)
  - [Continue weekly syncs to track progress and align on strategy](https://fathom.video/share/czR4u2GKqbPP4jweoX3_spDrU7dxdzYp?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
